terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: To continue, review and accept our terms of service.
terms.p1: By using Reqs-AI you accept these terms. The platform processes meeting transcripts and generates AI-assisted requirement artifacts; you are responsible for the content you upload and for having the necessary permissions.
terms.p2: Your information is isolated per organization (tenant) and is not shared with third parties without your consent. You can request the deletion of your data at any time.
terms.p3: You must not use the service for illegal purposes or upload information that infringes third-party rights. AI-generated content is a suggestion and must be reviewed before use.
terms.p4: We make reasonable efforts to keep the service available, but it is provided "as is". These terms may be updated; we'll ask you to accept them again when they change.
terms.accept: I have read and accept Reqs-AI's Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
terms.errorSessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
terms.errorGeneric: Could not record acceptance. Please try again.
